summary: Tested Category and Product features for MIS Dashboard. All 9 backend API tests passed (100%). All 8 frontend UI tests passed. Category/Product dropdowns work in Add Entry dialog, Edit Entry dialog, and LoanForm. Quick filters (Category, Product, Bank) work correctly with __all__ sentinel value fix. Table shows Category and Product columns.

issues: Console warning: Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent - accessibility improvement needed

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/master/categories returns list of 6 categories
Backend: GET /api/master/products returns list of 6 products
Backend: POST /api/loans with category and product fields succeeds
Backend: POST /api/loans with empty category/product succeeds
Backend: PUT /api/loans/{id} updates category and product
Backend: PUT /api/loans/{id} can clear category/product to empty
Backend: GET /api/loans includes category and product fields
Backend: Master categories contains SECURED, UNSECURED
Backend: Master products contains Home Loan, Personal Loan
UI: MIS Board page loads with quick filters visible
UI: Category quick filter dropdown shows all categories (All Categories, CAR LOAN, PID, PVT Funding, SECURED, Salaried, UNSECURED)
UI: Product quick filter dropdown populated from master data
UI: Bank quick filter dropdown populated from master data
UI: Quick filter selection filters loans correctly (CAR LOAN shows 'No entries found')
UI: Clear button appears when filter is applied
UI: MIS table shows Category and Product columns
UI: Add Entry dialog has Category and Product dropdown selects
UI: Edit Entry dialog has Category and Product dropdown selects with current values
UI: LoanForm (New Loan Application) has Category and Product dropdown selects

backend_apis.GET /api/master/categories: Returns list of categories sorted by name
backend_apis.GET /api/master/products: Returns list of products sorted by name

MonthlyMIS.jsx.quick_filters: Category, Product, Bank dropdowns with __all__ sentinel value
MonthlyMIS.jsx.table_columns: Category and Product columns visible in expanded month table
MonthlyMIS.jsx.add_entry_dialog: Category and Product dropdown selects with data-testid
MonthlyMIS.jsx.edit_entry_dialog: Category and Product dropdown selects with current values
MonthlyMIS.jsx.inline_editing: Category and Product cells support inline dropdown editing

context_for_next_testing_agent: Category and Product features fully tested and working. Master data seeded with 6 categories and 6 products. Quick filters use __all__ sentinel value that converts to empty string. Edit Entry dialog shows current category/product values. All CRUD operations for loans with category/product work correctly.
